notes: Strict comparison targets cover the captured customersCount data and `extensions.search[]` warnings for total plus two filtered-looking `customersCount(query:)` slices (`email:` and `state:`). On this host Shopify treated both query fields as invalid/no-op while still returning exact total counts plus warnings, and the local proxy mirrors that conservative captured behavior instead of reusing the richer `customers` search grammar for counts. Shopify cost extensions remain outside this contract.
